technology.title: Intel and LG Display may have beaten Apple and Qualcomm with the best laptop battery life ever
technology.summary: One of the coolest laptops we saw at CES in January was the new Dell XPS 16, with a unique 1-120Hz variable refresh rate display that can sip power when you don't need the screen to stay speedy. Just how little power might it consume? Notebookcheck has tested a version of the laptop with that […]

briefing.news_focus: One of the coolest laptops we saw at CES in January was the new Dell XPS 16, with a unique 1-120Hz variable refresh rate display that can sip power when you don't need the screen to stay speedy. Just how little power might it consume? Notebookcheck has tested a version of the laptop with that […]
briefing.news_focus_zh: Intel 和 LG Display 可能在筆記型電腦電池壽命方面超越 Apple 和 Qualcomm，特別是新款 Dell XPS 16 採用的變頻顯示技術，顯示出其在能耗管理上的潛力。
briefing.background: 隨著筆記型電腦市場競爭加劇，電池壽命成為消費者選擇的重要因素。Intel 和 LG Display 的合作開發了具變頻刷新率的顯示技術，旨在提高能效，這在 CES 展會上引起了廣泛關注。過去，Apple 和 Qualcomm 在高效能與電池壽命方面一直是市場領導者，這使得新技術的出現可能改變市場格局。
briefing.analysis: Intel 和 LG Display 的新技術可能會對 Apple 和 Qualcomm 造成壓力，迫使他們加速創新以維持市場競爭力。對於消費者而言，這意味著更長的電池壽命和更高的性能，可能會改變消費者的購買決策。此外，這一技術的成功實施可能促使其他廠商跟進，進一步推動整個行業的技術進步。

technology.title: Delve did the security compliance on LiteLLM, an AI project hit by malware
technology.summary: LiteLLM offers an AI open source project used by millions that was infected by credential harvesting malware.

briefing.news_focus: LiteLLM offers an AI open source project used by millions that was infected by credential harvesting malware.
briefing.news_focus_zh: LiteLLM，一個被數百萬人使用的開源AI項目，遭遇了憑證竊取惡意軟體的感染，Delve負責其安全合規性檢查。
briefing.background: LiteLLM作為一個開源AI項目，吸引了大量開發者與使用者，然而，開源軟體的特性也使其更容易受到安全威脅。隨著AI技術的迅速發展，相關的安全問題愈加突出，尤其是惡意軟體的威脅。Delve作為安全合規性檢查的提供者，其角色在此事件中顯得尤為重要，因為它需要確保LiteLLM的安全性，以維護用戶信任與項目完整性。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件凸顯了開源AI項目在安全性上的脆弱性，對於使用LiteLLM的開發者與企業而言，這可能導致信任危機，並影響其業務運作。Delve的介入可能有助於修復安全漏洞，但也可能引發對其安全檢查能力的質疑。不同利益方的立場可能有所不同，開發者希望快速解決問題以恢復使用，而企業則可能考慮轉向其他更安全的選擇，這可能影響LiteLLM的市場地位。

supporting_titles: The surprise hit Nex Playground is the latest console to get a price hike

technology.title: Resident Evil at 30: how Capcom’s horror opus has survived and thrived
technology.summary: From owing a debt to obscure Japanese horror Sweet Home to the influence of Aliens and Texas Chain Saw Massacre, the franchise continues to petrify players three decades on To many of us playing and writing about video games in the 1990s, Resident Evil seemed to come out of nowhere. The emerging PlayStation and Saturn consoles were all about slick, bright arcade conversions – the shiny thrills of Daytona and Tekken – and Japanese publisher Capcom was in a rut of coin-op conversions and endless sequels to Street Fighter and Mega Man. Scary games were rare at the time and mostly confined to the PC. So when the news of a horror title named Biohazard (the Japanese name for the series) started to emerge in 1995, it caught the attention of games journalists as it seemed radically out of step with prevailing trends. Games were about power, but as early demos quickly revealed, Resident Evil was about vulnerability. Thirty years later, it’s still here. The series has sold more than 180m copies worldwide, with 11 core titles and dozens of spinoffs and remakes, as well as film, television and anime tie-ins. Its characters and monsters are icons, its tropes now embedded in game design practice. What has allowed it to not only survive but flourish in such a rapidly changing industry? Why do we still let it scare us? Continue reading...

The emerging PlayStation and Saturn consoles were all about slick, bright arcade conversions – the shiny thrills of Daytona and Tekken – and Japanese publisher Capcom was in a rut of coin-op conversions and endless sequels to Street Fighter and Mega Man. Scary games were rare at the time and mostly confined to the PC. So when the news of a horror title named Biohazard (the Japanese name for the series) started to emerge in 1995, it caught the attention of games journalists as it seemed radically out of step with prevailing trends. Games were about power, but as early demos quickly revealed, Resident Evil was about vulnerability. Thirty years later, it’s still here. The series has sold more than 180m copies worldwide, with 11 core titles and dozens of spinoffs and remakes, as well as film, television and anime tie-ins. Why do we still let it scare us? Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 《生化危機》系列在推出三十年後，依然持續吸引玩家，並成功銷售超過1.8億部。該系列的成功源於其獨特的恐怖元素與角色設計，並在遊戲產業中樹立了新的標準。
briefing.background: 《生化危機》最初於1996年推出，當時遊戲市場以動作與競技類型為主，恐怖遊戲相對稀少。Capcom憑藉此系列開創了生存恐怖類型，並受到了早期日本恐怖作品及西方電影的影響。隨著遊戲技術的進步，該系列不斷推出新作與重製版，並擴展至電影及電視等媒體，形成龐大的品牌生態。
briefing.analysis: 《生化危機》的成功反映了玩家對於恐怖與挑戰的持續需求。Capcom透過不斷創新與適應市場變化，成功維持了品牌的活力。對於玩家而言，這不僅是遊戲，更是一種文化現象，象徵著恐懼與勇氣的對抗。未來，隨著虛擬實境等新技術的發展，該系列可能會進一步拓展其表現形式與玩家體驗。

politics.title: Ukraine war briefing: Zelenskyy says US has linked security guarantees to ceding of Donbas
politics.summary: Ukrainian president says peace deal proposed by US includes handing over land to Russia. What we know on day 1,492 Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Ukrainian president says peace deal proposed by US includes handing over land to Russia. What we know on day 1,492 Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基表示，美國提出的和平協議將烏克蘭的安全保障與讓渡頓巴斯地區的條件相連結，這一消息引發了對烏克蘭主權及未來和平進程的擔憂。
briefing.background: 自2014年克里米亞危機以來，烏克蘭與俄羅斯之間的衝突持續升級，頓巴斯地區成為主要戰場。美國在此衝突中扮演重要角色，提供軍事和經濟支持。隨著戰爭進入第1492天，和平談判的可能性再次被提上日程，但涉及領土的讓步問題一直是各方難以達成共識的焦點。
briefing.analysis: 澤倫斯基的聲明顯示出烏克蘭政府對美國提議的強烈不滿，認為這可能損害其國家主權。美國在此問題上的立場可能反映出其希望促進和平的戰略考量，但也可能引發烏克蘭內部的政治反彈。俄羅斯則可能利用這一提議來加強其在頓巴斯地區的影響力，進一步挑戰烏克蘭的領土完整。各方的立場差異將對未來的和平進程產生深遠影響。

politics.title: Taiwan’s First PRC-born Legislator Stokes Controversy
politics.summary: The status of Chinese spouses of Taiwanese has been increasingly a topic of debate in Taiwan.

briefing.news_focus: The status of Chinese spouses of Taiwanese has been increasingly a topic of debate in Taiwan.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 台灣首位中國出生的立法委員引發爭議，尤其是關於中國配偶在台灣的地位問題，成為當前政治辯論的焦點。
briefing.background: 隨著兩岸關係的變化，台灣社會對中國配偶的接納度與法律地位的討論日益增加。過去幾年，隨著中國籍配偶在台灣家庭中的比例上升，相關政策及法律問題逐漸浮出水面。此事件的發生，反映出台灣對於中國籍人士的態度與政策的複雜性，尤其是在政治層面上，涉及國家認同與社會整合的議題。
briefing.analysis: 此事件引發的爭議主要集中在兩岸關係的敏感性及台灣內部的政治分歧。支持者認為，這是對多元文化的接受與包容，能促進社會和諧；而反對者則擔心這可能會影響台灣的主權與國家安全，特別是在中國對台政策日益強硬的背景下。各方的立場差異顯示出台灣社會在面對中國配偶問題上的分歧，未來可能會影響相關政策的制定與社會氛圍。

politics.title: Fears net zero is ‘next Brexit’ as oil crisis fuels political climate divide
politics.summary: Rising energy bills give Reform and Tories opening to attack net zero while government hesitant to make case for clean energy Could net zero become “the next Brexit”? That is the fear stalking climate advocates as the oil crisis caused by the war on Iran starts to bite. A powerful coalition of the well-funded Reform party , led by Nigel Farage, the Conservative party, some business interests, and the UK’s right-wing media , are engaged in an onslaught against the longstanding target of reaching net zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050 . Continue reading...

A powerful coalition of the well-funded Reform party , led by Nigel Farage, the Conservative party, some business interests, and the UK’s right-wing media , are engaged in an onslaught against the longstanding target of reaching net zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050 . briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國面臨能源危機，導致能源費用上升，改革黨與保守黨聯手攻擊政府的淨零排放政策，氣候倡導者擔心這會成為類似於脫歐的政治分歧。
briefing.background: 隨著全球能源價格上漲，特別是因伊朗戰爭引發的油價危機，英國政府在推動2050年達成淨零排放的目標上面臨越來越大的壓力。改革黨與保守黨利用此機會質疑淨零政策的可行性，並試圖吸引選民對清潔能源的懷疑，這可能會影響未來的氣候政策與能源戰略。
briefing.analysis: 改革黨與保守黨的聯手攻擊可能導致英國社會對淨零排放政策的支持度下降，並引發類似脫歐的政治分裂。氣候倡導者擔心，若政府未能有效溝通清潔能源的長期利益，將可能使英國在全球氣候行動中處於不利地位。此外，企業界的利益也可能因政策不確定性而受到影響，進而影響投資決策與市場信心。

supporting_titles: Philippines Approves Shift to Dirtier Fuels as Oil Supply Crisis Bites

economy.title: Global markets brace for rate hikes as prolonged Iran war stokes tightening fears
economy.summary: Expectations of monetary tightening by global central banks have intensified, triggering a fresh wave of sell-offs in risk assets as the US-Israel war with Iran enters its fourth week. Rates traders are now projecting no rate cuts by the Federal Reserve this year after chair Jerome Powell said last week that rising oil prices added uncertainty to the monetary outlook. That stands in contrast to the forecast of two reductions before the outbreak of the hostilities in the Middle East. The European...

briefing.news_focus: Expectations of monetary tightening by global central banks have intensified, triggering a fresh wave of sell-offs in risk assets as the US-Israel war with Iran enters its fourth week. That stands in contrast to the forecast of two reductions before the outbreak of the hostilities in the Middle East. The European...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著美以與伊朗的戰爭進入第四週，全球市場對於央行加息的預期加劇，導致風險資產出現新一波拋售。美國聯邦儲備主席鮑威爾表示，油價上漲增加了貨幣政策的不確定性，市場預測今年不會有降息。
briefing.background: 自從美以與伊朗的衝突加劇以來，全球經濟面臨不確定性，特別是能源價格的波動。過去幾個月，市場原本預期美國聯邦儲備會在年內進行兩次降息，但隨著地緣政治風險的上升，這一預期已經改變。央行的貨幣政策將受到油價上漲的影響，進一步影響全球市場的流動性和風險偏好。
briefing.analysis: 各方利益關係在此事件中顯著交織。美國聯邦儲備的加息預期將對投資者情緒產生壓力，特別是在風險資產市場。投資者可能會轉向更安全的資產，導致股市和其他風險資產的進一步下跌。另一方面，能源生產國可能會因油價上漲而受益，但這也可能加劇全球通脹壓力，影響消費者支出和經濟增長。各國央行在應對這一局勢時，將面臨政策選擇的困難。

economy.title: UK consumer confidence has ‘collapsed’ during Iran war, retail industry says
economy.summary: BRC survey finds public even more pessimistic about finances as higher energy prices fuel inflation fears Consumer confidence in the UK has “collapsed” since the start of the Iran war, according to new research from the British Retail Consortium. The sharp rise in energy prices caused by the effective closure of the strait of Hormuz and attacks on infrastructure in the region has led to fears of higher inflation and weaker growth across oil-importing countries. Continue reading...

Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 根據英國零售協會的調查，自伊朗戰爭開始以來，英國消費者信心已經大幅下滑，主要因為能源價格上漲引發的通脹擔憂，影響了民眾對財務狀況的看法。
briefing.background: 伊朗戰爭的爆發導致霍爾木茲海的運輸通道受到威脅，這對全球能源市場造成了直接影響。英國作為一個主要的石油進口國，面臨著能源價格飆升的挑戰，進一步加劇了通脹壓力。隨著生活成本上升，消費者的購買力受到侵蝕，這使得零售行業的前景變得更加黯淡。
briefing.analysis: 消費者信心的崩潰將對零售業造成嚴重影響，尤其是在高通脹環境下，消費者可能會減少非必需品的支出。零售商面臨的挑戰是如何應對成本上升與需求減少的雙重壓力。政府可能需要考慮推出刺激措施以穩定經濟，但這也可能引發財政赤字的擔憂。不同利益方之間的角力將影響未來的政策走向。

economy.title: Trump's tariffs had little impact on GDP in 2025, but raised revenue, academic paper finds - Reuters
economy.summary: Trump's tariffs had little impact on GDP in 2025, but raised revenue, academic paper finds Reuters

briefing.news_focus: Trump's tariffs had little impact on GDP in 2025, but raised revenue, academic paper finds Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 一篇學術論文指出，特朗普的關稅政策在2025年對美國GDP的影響微乎其微，但卻顯著提高了政府的稅收收入。
briefing.background: 特朗普政府於2018年開始實施的關稅政策，旨在保護美國製造業並減少貿易赤字。這些關稅主要針對中國及其他國家，雖然初期引發了貿易戰，但隨著時間推移，經濟學者對其長期影響的研究逐漸增多。根據最新研究，儘管關稅增加了政府收入，但對GDP的影響卻不如預期，顯示出政策效果的複雜性。
briefing.analysis: 這項研究的結果可能引發對特朗普關稅政策的重新評估。支持者可能會強調提高稅收的正面影響，而批評者則可能指出政策未能有效促進經濟增長。企業界可能會對未來的貿易政策感到不安，尤其是在全球供應鏈重組的背景下。此外，這一結果也可能影響未來政府的貿易決策，尤其是在選舉期間，候選人可能會重新考量關稅政策的利弊。

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體脈絡顯示出科技、政治與經濟三個領域之間的相互影響。科技版面報導的電池壽命進步及AI安全問題，反映出在全球競爭與數位安全日益重要的背景下，企業如何應對挑戰。而在政治方面，烏克蘭局勢與台灣立法委員的爭議，則顯示出地緣政治對國內政策的影響，進一步加劇了市場的不確定性，特別是在經濟版面中提到的全球央行加息預期與消費者信心下滑，均與當前的政治氣候緊密相關。
